mapper.sql: id, datasource_id, product_id, cluster_id, exec_status, exec_result, exec_message, create_time, modify_time
mapper.insert: insert into datasource_azkaban_connection (id, datasource_id, product_id, cluster_id, exec_status, exec_result, exec_message, create_time, modify_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{datasourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{clusterId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{execStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{execResult,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{execMessage,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into datasource_azkaban_connection
id,
datasource_id,
product_id,
cluster_id,
exec_status,
exec_result,
exec_message,
create_time,
modify_time,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{datasourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{clusterId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update datasource_azkaban_connection
datasource_id = #{datasourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
cluster_id = #{clusterId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exec_status = #{execStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
exec_result = #{execResult,jdbcType=TINYINT},
exec_message = #{execMessage,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update datasource_azkaban_connection set datasource_id = #{datasourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, cluster_id = #{clusterId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exec_status = #{execStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, exec_result = #{execResult,jdbcType=TINYINT}, exec_message = #{execMessage,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
REPLACE INTO datasource_azkaban_connection(exec_status, datasource_id, product_id, cluster_id) VALUES
(3, #{datasourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{clusterId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
